allowed: Controlled joint training is only a small validation of FutureSemanticTraceState supervision.
Association/reacquisition remains utility, not method definition.
Frozen recurrent trace modules may remain in train mode solely to satisfy cuDNN backward while their parameters remain frozen.
forbidden: Large training before joint signal is verified.
Claiming paper-level world model if only headonly event-level result is positive.
Treating this Stage2 validation split export as external hard-case full-model export.
